subject: cleanup(css): remove brand palette — DaisyUI theme colors are the brand
body:
DaisyUI's semantic colors (primary, secondary, accent, etc.) are the
app's brand identity now. Keeping a separate brand-* palette alongside
DaisyUI creates two competing color systems — exactly what the migration
eliminated. Removed the 10-shade emerald brand scale.

Retained: overspend (#ef4444), underspend (#22c55e), data-neutral
(#6b7280) — these are fixed data-meaning colors for chart visualization,
not brand colors.

Tags: css, theme, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
